plant: Collect elders, replace animals, and refill troughs
directions: Use the pen selector and check only the pens actually emptied and replaced.
paymentItem: Woad leaves · Gorajian mushrooms · raw tuna
note: Completing this step starts individual elder timers for selected Manor Farm pens. Ranch Out of Time is excluded.

plant: Money tree seed, only when ready and available
directions: The money-tree patch is beside the Manor Farm activity area and bank.
note: Optional on each run. The seed is planted directly and the tree cannot become diseased. Withdraw it from the Manor Farm bank only when this patch is ready.

directions: Run west from the spirit tree to the fruit-tree patch.
Run east from the spirit tree to the fruit-tree patch.
note: The regular-tree patch is the next step at the same destination.

directions: Run southwest from the spirit-tree area to the regular-tree patch.
Use the loose railing, ask Elkoy to guide you out, then run southwest.
Run east/southeast from the lodestone to the fruit-tree patch.
Run to the fruit-tree patch inside the habitat farming area.
Run southeast through Lletya to the fruit-tree patch.
Run north/northwest toward the fruit-tree patch.
Run to the regular-tree patch on the outer side of the district.
Run to the elder-tree patch on the outer section of Crwys.
note: Normally include this step only when the elder tree is ready.

directions: Run to the southeast side of the Tower of Voices.
note: Do not replace the tree during normal daily runs. A crystal acorn is only needed when first establishing the patch.

directions: Use the right-click farm destination, then enter Dalia's nursery.
note: Complete all three Havenhythe nursery patches before leaving.

directions: Move to the fruit-tree patch in the nursery.
Move to the calquat patch before leaving the nursery.
Run toward the regular-tree patch near the general-store side of town.
Enter the Varrock Castle courtyard and use the regular-tree patch.
Run into Falador Park to the regular-tree patch.
Run north from the lodestone to the regular-tree patch.

teleport: Anachronia Teleport → Totem of the Abyss
directions: The cactus patch is close to the active Totem of the Abyss location.
Run northwest toward Zahra and the constructed cactus patch.
Run north toward the Archaeology table; the cactus patch is nearby.
Run northeast/east from the lodestone to the cactus patch.
Run north to the calquat-tree patch.
